nodes.name: Webhook: Receive Task
nodes.notes: Receives: { task, files, branch, priority, assignee_hint }

nodes.name: Spawn Manus Instance
nodes.notes: Replace with actual Manus API endpoint when available. For now, log the prompt for manual session creation.

parameters.title: ={{ $node['Build Manus Prompt'].json.branch }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'queued', branch: $node['Build Manus Prompt'].json.branch, pr_url: $node['GitHub: Open Draft PR'].json.html_url }) }}

meta.description: Receives a task payload, creates a GitHub feature branch, spawns a Manus instance with the task prompt, opens a draft PR, and returns the branch + PR URL to the caller.
